title: Chalach #2477
definition:
Halah = "painful"

 1) a city or district in Mesopotamia under Assyrian control where the
    Israelite captives were taken
nasbUsage:

 1) a city or district in Mesopotamia under Assyrian control where the
    Israelite captives were taken

    NASB:  an area under Assyr. control
